input.title: JPMorgan tweaks full-year NII guidance within prior range
input.content: JPMorgan Chase (JPM) slightly adjusted full-year net interest income guidance toward the middle of its previously stated range during a conference appearance. No new quarterly earnings print was released. Management reiterated the existing capital return framework.

mockModelResponse.headline: JPMorgan fine-tunes NII guidance
mockModelResponse.summary: JPM nudged full-year NII guidance within its prior range without a new earnings release. Tone was steady rather than a major surprise.

meta.notes: Guidance tweak related to earnings outlook, not a full print.
